steps.title: Rewrite equations and use elimination to find x
steps.content:
From $7y = -6x + 2170$, rearrange to $6x + 7y = 2170$.

Multiply this equation by 4 to match the coefficient of $x$ in the second equation:
$$4(6x + 7y) = 4(2170)$$
$$24x + 28y = 8680$$

Add this to the second equation $24x - 28y = 1400$:
$$(24x + 28y) + (24x - 28y) = 8680 + 1400$$
$$48x = 10080$$
$$x = 210$$

steps.title: Substitute back to find y and compute x + y
